content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally led by banks (+1.39%) and realty (+2.14%), with VIX collapsing -6.7% to 17.53 indicating fear unwind. Bank Q4 earnings season is delivering strong prints (ICICI, HDFC, Nestle, Mahabank, Persistent all beat). Macro supportive with RBI holding repo and stable global cues, but need to monitor FII flows. Existing positions are well-aligned with the prevailing themes (banks, FMCG quality, defence, PSU bank).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24350,
      "nifty_resistance": 24700
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ICICIBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 1355.00,
      "new_target": 1460.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit if target Rs 1460 not achieved within 10 trading days, or on close below 20-DMA.",
      "reasoning": "Best-in-class asset quality (GNPA 1.40%), beat Q4 estimates, dividend declared. Supporting at R1 of Rs 1355 makes a tight SL level. Target Rs 1460 takes us near 52-week high Rs 1500. R:R ~2:1 from entry. Position intact; setting protective SL just below today's low / pivot."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 1320.00,
      "new_target": 1475.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit if target not hit in 10 days or if post-results euphoria fades with close below Rs 1320.",
      "reasoning": "Best-in-9-years Q4 (+27% PAT, +23% revenue), 52-week high breakout, FMCG defensive with earnings momentum. SL Rs 1320 below prior resistance that is now support (old 52-wk high Rs 1340). Target Rs 1475 is +7% move riding momentum. Gap-up risk means SL held wider at ~4.3%."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 75.50,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit if Rs 88 target not achieved in 10 trading days; tighten SL after +5% move.",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +35% YoY, best-in-class NNPA 0.13%, 52-wk high breakout on 2.4x volume. SL at Rs 75.50 just below today's low and breakout zone. Target Rs 88 is ~10% upside. Dilution overhang from Rs 7,500cr raise is a risk to size around, hence moderate confidence."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 70,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results on April 25 (4 days away) is a binary event. Stock at 52-wk high Rs 1039 while analyst consensus targets are Rs 600-720 — valuation far ahead of fundamentals. Leadership transition adds execution uncertainty. Better to book the move and sidestep binary risk rather than hold into earnings. Will re-evaluate post-results."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ZENTEC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 1640.00,
      "new_target": 1900.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit if Rs 1900 not reached in 8 days; tighten SL to breakeven after +4% move.",
      "reasoning": "Strong momentum (+33% in 30 days) on defence license catalyst, 3.5x volume. However, intrinsic valuation models suggest stock is 38-73% overvalued — this is pure momentum trade. SL at Rs 1640 below today's low and R1 zone; target Rs 1900 at R2/psychological level. R:R ~1.6:1. Keeping position but will trail tightly."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 50,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 975.00,
      "stop_loss": 930.00,
      "target": 1070.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit if target Rs 1070 not reached within 10 trading days or on close below Rs 930.",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +19% YoY (14% beat), loan AUM +15.3%, disbursements +20.8%, GNPA best-in-class at 0.93%. Broker upgrade (MOFSL target Rs 1143). Clean breakout above Rs 930 resistance on 1.3x volume. SL at Rs 930 (prior resistance now support), target Rs 1070 gives R:R ~2:1. Small position (~5% capital) given caution flagged on sector."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "PERSISTENT",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 10,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 5320.00,
      "stop_loss": 5100.00,
      "target": 5750.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit if Rs 5750 not achieved in 8 days; trail SL after +4% move.",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +33% YoY, revenue +25% — best-in-class in IT sector. 24 consecutive quarters of sequential growth. Stock consolidating after results; EMA9 support at Rs 5360. SL Rs 5100 below S2, target Rs 5750 near upper Bollinger. R:R ~2:1. Small position (~5%) given IT sector headwinds and premium valuation."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HDFCBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Bearish engulfing on Apr 16 plus Doji today suggests indecision. Down 20% YTD, NII growth only 3.8%, sector laggard. Better banking exposure already via ICICIBANK and MAHABANK. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ELECON",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT collapsed 96% YoY, goodwill impairment, revenue -6.5%. Today's +8% move on 2.1x volume looks like short covering on capital goods sector strength, not fundamental. Avoid."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "KEC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.48,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Bearish engulfing on Apr 20 followed by today's rebound creates unclear setup. Axis expects flat Q4 revenue. Good order book story but chart is choppy. Wait for cleaner breakout above Rs 600."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GODREJPROP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Record bookings but weak cash flow conversion and 32% 1-year decline. Promoter buying is positive. However, sector allocation will exceed comfort if I add realty now — sitting at upper Bollinger resistance. Watch for pullback to Rs 1700."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q3 P&L weak (PAT -29%, rev -22%). Low liquidity (avg Rs 19 Cr/day). Results imminent, trading window closed. Too many unknowns. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAELXSI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "FY26 revenue nearly flat YoY, Transportation segment stalled. Dividend-driven pop not a momentum trade. Premium valuation with decelerating growth. Persistent is the better IT bet in this basket."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DEEPAKNTR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "PL downgrade to REDUCE with target Rs 1354 (below CMP). PC resin oversupply threatens growth thesis. Today's 7% rally on 0.5x volume is not confirmed by participation. Clear pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BANKBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already have direct banking exposure via ICICIBANK and MAHABANK. Adding BANKBEES would concentrate sector weight excessively. Pass."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "ICICIBANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1355.00,
      "reasoning": "Establish protective SL at R1/pivot level; position is fresh, no room to trail aggressively yet."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1320.00,
      "reasoning": "SL just below old 52-week high resistance which now acts as support post-breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 75.50,
      "reasoning": "SL below today's low and recent breakout zone. Monitor for equity raise announcement."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Binary event risk with Q4 results in 4 days + valuation well above consensus targets. Booking exposure before the event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ZENTEC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1640.00,
      "reasoning": "Momentum trade — SL just below today's low. Intrinsic valuation concerns argue for tight risk management."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "KEC — wait for a decisive close above Rs 600 with volume for swing entry. GODREJPROP — watch for pullback to Rs 1700 support before considering realty exposure. HDFCBANK — needs close above Rs 820 to turn actionable. TATAELXSI — wait for close above Rs 4750 or pullback to Rs 4400.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Day 2, building a disciplined book. Current deployment ~34% will reduce after AUBANK exit, freeing ~Rs 73K. Adding PNBHOUSING (~Rs 49K) and PERSISTENT (~Rs 53K) keeps me at ~40% deployed — well under 80% cap. Sector exposure: Banking (ICICI+MAHABANK ~Rs 166K = 16.6%), FMCG (NESTLE ~Rs 50K = 5%), Defence (ZENTEC ~Rs 52K = 5.2%), Financial Services (PNBHOUSING ~Rs 49K = 4.9%), IT (PERSISTENT ~Rs 53K = 5.3%). All within sector caps. Keeping cash buffer >50% given early-experiment caution. Q4 earnings season risk means I'm prioritizing post-result winners over pre-result holdings."
}
